summary: Bug-fix verification for iteration_14 critical crash on /admin/representatives. Backend: new pytest test_countries.py (3 tests) all PASS — GET /api/countries returns 200 for owner with 66 ISO countries (FR/GB/DE/ES/IT/... present, each item has {code,name}), rep gets 403, unauth gets 401. Full iteration_14 QA readiness suite (29 tests) re-run: 100% PASS, no regression. Combined 32/32 passing in 4.94s. Frontend: logged in as owner, navigated to /admin/representatives — NO red 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay, page renders cleanly, reps-table + 2 rep-row-* data-testid rows present, Victor Laurent shown Active (Paris Media Group / FR), Amelia Hart shown Suspended (London House Media / GB), 0 pageerrors, 0 console errors. Clicked 'New representative' — dialog opens with country Select populated with 66 options including France, United Kingdom, Germany, Spain, Italy. Promise.allSettled hardening confirmed in code (Representatives.jsx lines 22-27): each state setter guarded by fulfilled check so a failure of /countries would not block reps rendering.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix is clean: reference.py is a small, well-scoped module guarded by require_admin; Representatives.jsx uses Promise.allSettled with per-promise fulfilled guards — the exact hardening pattern suggested in iteration_14 RCA. Consider auditing other admin pages (e.g., pages that do Promise.all over primary+secondary lookups) for the same defensive pattern.
test_credentials: Owner admin@independentmedia.hub / Admin2026! ; Rep victor.laurent@parismedia.fr / Rep2026!
seed_data_creation: None — reused iteration_14 fixtures per review instructions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_14 critical bug fully resolved. /api/countries endpoint live (admin-only) and Representatives.jsx defensively loads via Promise.allSettled. Regression suite green.
rca of the issue: N/A — verifying fix. Original RCA in iteration_14.json remains accurate; both mitigation (a) [add endpoint] and (b) [Promise.allSettled] were applied together, giving belt-and-suspenders resilience.
